response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development on Windows platforms and has no visible experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with only a brief, non-commercial C++ project from 2014 unrelated to financial systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows in the last 10 years
Absence of any capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain experience
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with mandatory C++/SQL Server/Oracle requirements

key_factors.factor: SQL experience unverified and not paired with financial systems
